Subject: Urgent: Vehicle Tax Payment Failure Notification.
Body: GOV.UK We hope this message finds you well. We are writing to inform you that your latest vehicle tax payment to the Driver & Vehicle Licensing Agency (DVLA) was unsuccessful. To avoid any penalties or disruptions to your vehicleвЂ™s tax status, we kindly ask you to update your payment details and complete the transaction as soon as possible. Update Now Our system will automatically retry the billing process once your billing details have been updated. It can take up to 5 working days for the records to update. To continue to the update page, please submit your vehicle tax details. Please Note: If you don't pay your vehicle tax on time, you may be fined up to ВЈ1,000, or your details may be passed to a debt collection agency.
text:
Urgent: Vehicle Tax Payment Failure Notification.

GOV.UK We hope this message finds you well. We are writing to inform you that your latest vehicle tax payment to the Driver & Vehicle Licensing Agency (DVLA) was unsuccessful. To avoid any penalties or disruptions to your vehicleвЂ™s tax status, we kindly ask you to update your payment details and complete the transaction as soon as possible. Update Now Our system will automatically retry the billing process once your billing details have been updated. It can take up to 5 working days for the records to update. To continue to the update page, please submit your vehicle tax details. Please Note: If you don't pay your vehicle tax on time, you may be fined up to ВЈ1,000, or your details may be passed to a debt collection agency.

Subject: Jeffrey Epstein reportedly tried to blackmail Bill Gates over affair
Body: Suspended prosecutor warns about "dictator" DeSantis. НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ НЏ вЂЊ By Marita Vlachou Monday, May 22 JEFFREY EPSTEIN TRIED TO BLACKMAIL BILL GATES OVER EXTRAMARITAL AFFAIR: WSJ Jeffrey Epstein had tried to blackmail Microsoft co-founder Bill Gates after discovering the billionaire had an affair with a Russian bridge player years earlier, according to The Wall Street Journal. The now-dead sex trafficker allegedly emailed Gates the veiled threat after failing to convince the billionaire to participate in a charity fund he tried to start. [HuffPost]RON DESANTIS IS ABOUT TO RUN FOR PRESIDENT. ANDREW WARREN HAS A WARNING. Andrew Warren, the Democratic prosecutor for a Florida county who was suspended by Gov. Ron DeSantis (R), has described the move as chilling for democracy. "No one else should have to adjust their behavior to the whims of the dictator," he told HuffPost's Liz Skalka. Warren also reflected on the possibility of DeSantis becoming president: "If you donвЂ™t say what he wants you to say, then you are at risk." [HuffPost]BIDEN TO MEET MCCARTHY OVER DEBT LIMIT President Joe Biden and House Speaker Kevin McCarthy spoke by phone Sunday while the president was returning home on Air Force One after the Group of Seven summit in Japan. Negotiators are trying to strike a deal to raise the country's debt limit. Biden and McCarthy are set to meet today at the White House. [AP]JORDAN NEELY'S KILLER ON CHOKEHOLD DEATH: IT 'HAD NOTHING TO DO WITH RACE' Daniel Penny вЂ” a Marine veteran who put Jordan Neely, a 30-year-old homeless Black man, in a fatal chokehold вЂ” has said the incident "had nothing to do with race." "I judge a person based on their character. IвЂ™m not a white supremacist," he said. [HuffPost] People on TikTok are using iodine to target pimples. But does it work? Here's exactly what happens when you remove fillers from your face. Does one bad apple really spoil the bunch? HereвЂ™s what to do with rotten, moldy food. How to actually answer the "where do you see yourself in five years" question. I used ChatGPT to write bedtime stories for my kid. It's not what I expected. Get the latest coronavirus updates on our dedicated page CONSERVATIVES WIN BIG IN GREEK ELECTION A wiretapping scandal and anger over a rail disaster wasn't enough to keep the party of Greek Prime Minister Kyriakos Mitsotakis from leading in elections. Mitsotakis, whose conservative party scored a landslide victory, but without the seats in Parliament to win outright, indicated he will seek a second election. [AP]WARNER BROS. DISCOVERY CEO BOOED OVER COMMENCEMENT SPEECH: 'PAY YOUR WRITERS' Scores of Boston University students on Sunday turned their backs on their commencement speaker David Zaslav, the head of one of HollywoodвЂ™s biggest studios. Some shouted вЂњpay your writersвЂќ in a stadium where protesters supporting the Hollywood writersвЂ™ strike picketed outside. [AP]GOP SENATOR THINKS TRUMP CAN'T WIN A PRESIDENTIAL ELECTION Louisiana Sen. Bill Cassidy became the latest Republican to back out of supporting Donald Trump, adding that he does not think the former president can win a general election in 2024. [HuffPost]STAMPEDE AT SOCCER STADIUM IN EL SALVADOR LEAVES 12 DEAD At least 12 people were killed and 100 more injured during a stampede at a soccer stadium in El Salvador Saturday. Authorities said fans attending the quarterfinals match between clubs Alianza and FAS at Monumental Stadium in CuscatlГЎn became angry after not being allowed to enter the stadium and knocked down an entrance gate. [HuffPost]NAACP WARNS AGAINST TRAVEL TO FLORIDA OVER DESANTIS' 'OPENLY HOSTILE' POLICIES The NAACPвЂ™s Board of Directors has issued a travel warning about Florida that accuses the state, and pointedly DeSantis, of being "openly hostile toward African Americans, people of color and LGBTQ+ individuals." [HuffPost]IF TRUMP 'FINISHED' HIS WALL, HOW ARE SO MANY MIGRANTS STILL CROSSING? Trump has continued lying about delivering on his 2016 campaign pledge to build a wall along the southern border. But despite his easily proven failure, most of his GOP rivals вЂ” all of whom say the United States must get tougher on border security вЂ” thus far do not seem inclined to point out TrumpвЂ™s record on the matter. [HuffPost] What number comes next? The Encyclopedia of Integer Sequences knows. The unexpected force that may make us get less sleep. How countries are throwing away their best chance to prevent the next pandemic. The case for shame. The next show you watch could be filmed in Mexico City. An Uvalde victimвЂ™s family feels betrayed by officials withholding details from that day. Ex-RNC chair ridicules Jim Jordan with cold "reality" of weaponization claims. Chuck Todd rips House Republican for defending TrumpвЂ™s 180 on debt ceiling talks. Taylor Swift fans wince after she says she's "never been this happy." Dad killed, two teens wounded after grenade explodes in Indiana home. GOP strategist flips Chris Christie's Trump vow back at him. Tuberville draws fire for holding hundreds of military promotions "hostage" over abortion. Former Florida GOP rep. considers drastic move because of DeSantis. I was adopted from China. People ask if I feel "lucky" вЂ” and my answer isn't what they expect. Golf club pro makes wild hole-in-one during storybook week at PGA Championship. 23 of the best engagement photos you haven't seen (but should). If you wanna travel like a pro, flight attendants adore these 25 things. 12 FatherвЂ™s Day gifts you can get at Target. Does somebody keep forwarding you this newsletter? вЂ” Subscribe here! Suspended prosecutor warns about "dictator" DeSantis. The now-dead sex trafficker allegedly emailed Gates the veiled threat after failing to convince the billionaire to participate in a charity fund he tried to start. [HuffPost]RON DESANTIS IS ABOUT TO RUN FOR PRESIDENT. ANDREW WARREN HAS A WARNING. Andrew Warren, the Democratic prosecutor for a Florida county who was suspended by Gov. Ron DeSantis (R), has described the move as chilling for democracy. "No one else should have to adjust their behavior to the whims of the dictator," he told HuffPost's Liz Skalka. Warren also reflected on the possibility of DeSantis becoming president: "If you donвЂ™t say what he wants you to say, then you are at risk." [HuffPost]BIDEN TO MEET MCCARTHY OVER DEBT LIMIT President Joe Biden and House Speaker Kevin McCarthy spoke by phone Sunday while the president was returning home on Air Force One after the Group of Seven summit in Japan. Negotiators are trying to strike a deal to raise the country's debt limit. Biden and McCarthy are set to meet today at the White House. [AP]JORDAN NEELY'S KILLER ON CHOKEHOLD DEATH: IT 'HAD NOTHING TO DO WITH RACE' Daniel Penny вЂ” a Marine veteran who put Jordan Neely, a 30-year-old homeless Black man, in a fatal chokehold вЂ” has said the incident "had nothing to do with race." "I judge a person based on their character. IвЂ™m not a white supremacist," he said. [HuffPost] People on TikTok are using iodine to target pimples. But does it work? Here's exactly what happens when you remove fillers from your face. Does one bad apple really spoil the bunch? HereвЂ™s what to do with rotten, moldy food. How to actually answer the "where do you see yourself in five years" question. I used ChatGPT to write bedtime stories for my kid. It's not what I expected. Get the latest coronavirus updates on our dedicated page CONSERVATIVES WIN BIG IN GREEK ELECTION A wiretapping scandal and anger over a rail disaster wasn't enough to keep the party of Greek Prime Minister Kyriakos Mitsotakis from leading in elections. Mitsotakis, whose conservative party scored a landslide victory, but without the seats in Parliament to win outright, indicated he will seek a second election. [AP]WARNER BROS. DISCOVERY CEO BOOED OVER COMMENCEMENT SPEECH: 'PAY YOUR WRITERS' Scores of Boston University students on Sunday turned their backs on their commencement speaker David Zaslav, the head of one of HollywoodвЂ™s biggest studios. Some shouted вЂњpay your writersвЂќ in a stadium where protesters supporting the Hollywood writersвЂ™ strike picketed outside. [AP]GOP SENATOR THINKS TRUMP CAN'T WIN A PRESIDENTIAL ELECTION Louisiana Sen. Bill Cassidy became the latest Republican to back out of supporting Donald Trump, adding that he does not think the former president can win a general election in 2024. [HuffPost]STAMPEDE AT SOCCER STADIUM IN EL SALVADOR LEAVES 12 DEAD At least 12 people were killed and 100 more injured during a stampede at a soccer stadium in El Salvador Saturday. Authorities said fans attending the quarterfinals match between clubs Alianza and FAS at Monumental Stadium in CuscatlГЎn became angry after not being allowed to enter the stadium and knocked down an entrance gate. [HuffPost]NAACP WARNS AGAINST TRAVEL TO FLORIDA OVER DESANTIS' 'OPENLY HOSTILE' POLICIES The NAACPвЂ™s Board of Directors has issued a travel warning about Florida that accuses the state, and pointedly DeSantis, of being "openly hostile toward African Americans, people of color and LGBTQ+ individuals." [HuffPost]IF TRUMP 'FINISHED' HIS WALL, HOW ARE SO MANY MIGRANTS STILL CROSSING? Trump has continued lying about delivering on his 2016 campaign pledge to build a wall along the southern border. But despite his easily proven failure, most of his GOP rivals вЂ” all of whom say the United States must get tougher on border security вЂ” thus far do not seem inclined to point out TrumpвЂ™s record on the matter. [HuffPost] What number comes next? The Encyclopedia of Integer Sequences knows. The unexpected force that may make us get less sleep. How countries are throwing away their best chance to prevent the next pandemic. The case for shame. The next show you watch could be filmed in Mexico City. An Uvalde victimвЂ™s family feels betrayed by officials withholding details from that day. Ex-RNC chair ridicules Jim Jordan with cold "reality" of weaponization claims. Chuck Todd rips House Republican for defending TrumpвЂ™s 180 on debt ceiling talks. Taylor Swift fans wince after she says she's "never been this happy." Dad killed, two teens wounded after grenade explodes in Indiana home. GOP strategist flips Chris Christie's Trump vow back at him. Subject: Re: [spambayes-dev] spoof detector
Body: on Fri Jul 06 2007, skip-AT-pobox.com wrote: > David> Something that comes up over and over in spam is a link of the > David> form: > > David> > David> http://url/of/some/legit/site > David> > > David> Does SpamBayes have a token that represents that information and > David> an option I can set that will use it? > > The SpamBayes tokenizer essentially splits the message at word boundaries, > so the two urls are considered separately. Yeah, I know that's the default behavior. > Their physical and structural proximity is not noted. Synthetic > tokens based on hostname or IP address in the urls will be generated > if you add x-pick_apart_urls:True to the Tokenizer section of your > config file. For completeness here is my current set of tokenizer > settings (haven't changed them in a long while): > > [Tokenizer] > record_header_absence:True > summarize_email_prefixes:True > summarize_email_suffixes:True > mine_received_headers:True > x-pick_apart_urls:True > x-fancy_url_recognition:False > x-lookup_ip:True > lookup_ip_cache:~/tmp/dnscache.pck > x-image_size:True > x-crack_images:True > x-ocr_engine:gocr > max_image_size:100000 > crack_image_cache:~/tmp/imagecache.pck That doesn't sound like it's doing what I'm asking about. I want a special token that is generated each time a link's text is just a URL and the link and the URL text don't point to the same place. Messages with this property are always spam and account for a large percentage of my unsures. No matter how much I train on them, they keep falling into unsure, so I thought if Spambayes could actually recognize their distinguishing feature I could easily train it to consider them spam. >From what you say above it looks like pick_apart_urls will generate tokens describing different parts of a given URL, but will do nothing to help capture this particular spammy relationship between enclosed text and actual link. Or did I misunderstand you? -- Dave Abrahams Boost Consulting http://www.boost-consulting.com The Astoria Seminar ==> http://www.astoriaseminar.com _______________________________________________ spambayes-dev mailing list bsfegmjrr-hnq@python.org http://mail.python.org/mailman/listinfo/spambayes-dev
text:
Re: [spambayes-dev] spoof detector

on Fri Jul 06 2007, skip-AT-pobox.com wrote: > David> Something that comes up over and over in spam is a link of the > David> form: > > David> > David> http://url/of/some/legit/site > David> > > David> Does SpamBayes have a token that represents that information and > David> an option I can set that will use it? > > The SpamBayes tokenizer essentially splits the message at word boundaries, > so the two urls are considered separately. Yeah, I know that's the default behavior. > Their physical and structural proximity is not noted. Synthetic > tokens based on hostname or IP address in the urls will be generated > if you add x-pick_apart_urls:True to the Tokenizer section of your > config file. For completeness here is my current set of tokenizer > settings (haven't changed them in a long while): > > [Tokenizer] > record_header_absence:True > summarize_email_prefixes:True > summarize_email_suffixes:True > mine_received_headers:True > x-pick_apart_urls:True > x-fancy_url_recognition:False > x-lookup_ip:True > lookup_ip_cache:~/tmp/dnscache.pck > x-image_size:True > x-crack_images:True > x-ocr_engine:gocr > max_image_size:100000 > crack_image_cache:~/tmp/imagecache.pck That doesn't sound like it's doing what I'm asking about. I want a special token that is generated each time a link's text is just a URL and the link and the URL text don't point to the same place. Messages with this property are always spam and account for a large percentage of my unsures. No matter how much I train on them, they keep falling into unsure, so I thought if Spambayes could actually recognize their distinguishing feature I could easily train it to consider them spam. >From what you say above it looks like pick_apart_urls will generate tokens describing different parts of a given URL, but will do nothing to help capture this particular spammy relationship between enclosed text and actual link. Or did I misunderstand you? -- Dave Abrahams Boost Consulting http://www.boost-consulting.com The Astoria Seminar ==> http://www.astoriaseminar.com _______________________________________________ spambayes-dev mailing list bsfegmjrr-hnq@python.org http://mail.python.org/mailman/listinfo/spambayes-dev

Subject: [UAI] phd and postdoc postion at SNN Nijmegen
Body: PhD student and postdoc position available at SNN Nijmegen. SNN Nijmegen is a research group dedicated to fundamental research in the areas of machine learning and computational neuroscience. Specific topics are Bayesian networks, approximate inference methods, time-series modeling, bio-informatics, expert systems, stochastic control and collaborative decision making. The group consists currently of 8 researchers and three programmers. In our group, we have two positions available that can be filled at either the PhD student level or at the postdoc level. See the job anouncements at http://www.mbfys.kun.nl/snn/nijmegen/index.php3?page=29 The requirement for the PhD student position is a completed university degree in physics, mathematics or computer science. The position is full-time for a period of 4 years. The requirement for the postdoc position is a PhD and publications on one of the above research topics. The postdoc position is full-time for a period of 2.5 years. For more information see www.snn.kun.nl/nijmegen or contact dr. H.J. Kappen (jqmc@snn.kun.nl, +31(0)24 3614241), or dr. W. Wiegerinck (kzsv@snn.kun.nl). Applications should contain a complete CV, a brief description of his or her research interests and a copy of a recent publication or dissertation (optional). Send your application before October 1 2004 either by email to dr. H.J. Kappen (jqmc@snn.kun.nl) and dr. W. Wiegerinck (kzsv@snn.kun.nl) or by ordinary mail to SNN, Radboud University Nijmegen, Geert Grooteplein 21, 6525 EZ Nijmegen, the Netherlands.

Body: FROM: WILLIAM DRALLO. CONFIDENTIAL TEL: 233-24-204567. I ascetained your contact through a reliable source,In my search for a foreign partner to assist me in my business. I am William Drallo, the son of late former Minister Of Mines and Natural Resource during the time of Major Koromah, the former Military Head of State of the Republic of Sierra Leone, who was massacred by president Tijani Kabba force in their struggle to reinstate him back to power. I and my brother are refugee here in Accra,Ghana since the death of our father, because of the condition of his death.Before the death of my father some months ago he disclosed to me some money and gold he had deposited in a security company here in ghana. The total amount of money which happened to be$28.3000.000.oo,US Dollars.And gold at 200Kg of 22Karat all in a security vault in ghana. The document regarding this consignment was handed over to me by my father before his death, I carefully search and found the security Company where I confirmed that the consignment were deposited for safe keeping in their securit vault in ghana. The content were deposited as a family valuable, By virtue of right as the son of my late father, the security company has accepted to release the consignment factually. I am seeking your assistance because my father has declared the record with the security company stating that his foreign parrtner shall be the authorised person to make claim on this consignment becaues of his position in government on which no name was given by my father as his foreign partner. To this effect, I request to make the beneficiary of his consignment in your name as foreign partner to claim this consignment. For your assistance,I am ready to give you 10%from the total sum. This is a risk free transaction as my father deposited this valuable as a personal belonging. In this situation every process to completely move this valuable may not exceed (7) working days, if your co-operation to assist is sort.please include your phone and fax number for easy communication I shall be very grateful to hear from you, all documents concerning this are intact with me, please kindly reach me as soon as possible in email address william22drallo@yahoo.com or william2244@maktoob.com BEST REGARDS William Drallo
